updates.title: Switched to new tax regime? Deductions and exemptions you can no longer claim

updates.title: Iran war to slow down India’s FY27 economic growth: rating agencies
updates.summary: Two rating agencies have cut their FY27 GDP forecasts as the West Asia war drives crude oil toward $95–110 a barrel, stokes inflation, and forces fuel price hikes. The government's own target of 7–7.4% growth, set before the war began, now looks out of reach.

updates.title: India not looking at a cut in capital gains tax for FPIs: Official
